Description

# User Story

As an exporter

I want the service to be designed in a user-friendly way

So that I can clearly understand and navigate the details I need to provide

# Acceptance Criteria

Scenario 1 - Landings section updated

Given I have navigated to page /check-your-information in my CC journey

When the page loads

Then the Landings details section contains the following fields in this order:

1.  How do you want to enter your products and landings?

2.  Species

3.  State

4.  Presentation

5.  Commodity code

6.  Start date

7.  Date landed

8.  Catch area

9.  High seas area

10. Exclusive economic zone

11. RFMO

12. Vessel name or PLN

13. Gear category

14. Gear type

15. Export weight

16. Total export weight (_Fields 2-15 may be repeated prior to this point to represent multiple products, then Total export weight would appear at the bottom of the Landings section._)

Scenario 2 - Information text updated

Given I have navigated to page /check-your-information in my CC journey

When the page loads

Then the information text underneath the Transport section reads '**You may be liable to investigation and enforcement action, including prosecution, if you knowingly submit false, misleading, or otherwise inaccurate data.**' and the text has the exclamation logo to the left of it

Scenario 3 - Now create your catch certificate guidance text added

Given I have navigated to page /check-your-information in my CC journey

When the page loads

Then underneath the information text at the bottom of the page there is a section called 'Now create your catch certificate'

And the section contains text as follows: 'By submitting this catch certificate, you confirm that:

- you understand that you are under a duty not to knowingly submit information that is false or otherwise inaccurate

- the fisheries administrations may undertake checks on the accuracy and validity of the data, cross-reference it with data held and submitted by others in the supply chain, and exchange data with other relevant fisheries administrations, including those in the country of export

- you understand that you may be liable to investigation and potentially to enforcement action, including prosecution, if you knowingly submit false, misleading, or otherwise inaccurate data'

And the 'Accept and create catch certificate' is below the bullet points

Scenario 4 - Place export leaves the UK renamed

Given I have navigated to page /check-your-information in my CC journey

When the page loads

Then the field 'Place export leaves the UK' is renamed to 'Place export leaves the departure country'

Scenario 5 - Welsh translation

Given I have navigated to page /check-your-information in my CC Manual Landing user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then all headers and field labels and guidance text will be translated into Welsh

# Screen Prototype
